stemHtml: The Take-Off Mass of an aircraft is 12 500 kg and the take-off Centre of Gravity is located 4.2 m aft of datum, which is out of the forward limit. Calculate the mass that must be moved from the forward cargo hold to the rear cargo hold, in order to move the CG to the forward limit 4.5 m aft of datum. The distance between the cargo holds is 15 m.
